segments.text: Out of the depths I cry to you, O Lord!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord, hear my voice! Let your ears be attentive to the voice of my pleas for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If you, O Lord, should mark iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But with you there is forgiveness, that you may be feared.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I wait for the Lord, my soul waits, and in his word I hope;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: my soul waits for the Lord more than watchmen for the morning, more than watchmen for the morning.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: I say…: or, which watch unto

segments.text: O Israel, hope in the Lord! For with the Lord there is steadfast love, and with him is plentiful redemption.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And he will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
segments.speaker: David
